title: Ioan Scheffel
text:
I am a PhD candidate in mathematics at the University of Stuttgart. My research focuses on stochastic processes, extreme value theory, and time series.
I am currently finishing my PhD and looking for postdoctoral positions.


Email: scheffin@tutamail.com
Affiliation: University of Stuttgart
